{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173712A63E26AAE376448A06A2"}"},"total":142},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606017986824586008","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看，尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空图图大战几百回合，但是薛宝钗确实太强了，要不是有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台，这波m4六倍扫射必死，除此之外，我比较欣赏诸葛亮图对花果山108个猴子说的一句话"小伙一身傲骨别在你亮哥面前摆谱"，表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨，总而言之，这本书情节有趣，体系明确，伏笔众多，打斗场面如身临其境，人物性格描述很到位!","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":22,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773999432448A06A2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227606017986824586008%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227561077268945062937%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770918347,"group_id":"7561077268945062937","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"「完全なるの黄金回旋エネルギー」","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2dT8k+a1O4WGcdXWqWhap27fN2EOSLqCUQCsyutHp3b","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d6fc6a3014dc4e5a998e778f9861663a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528474&x-signature=wefmZpEEAs3PpUMCYj%2FbmORZXLM%3D","user_id":"3737957673998621","user_name":"少女乐队为啥要有男主"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3737957673998621","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7561077268945062937","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，比较低）
（mygo+Mujica+孤独摇滚+日常+抱憾终身？）
（读者姥爷们总能在里面找到感兴趣的部分，具体参见书评区）
我叫方芷。
我似乎莫名其妙穿越了。
无灾无病，心理健康，家境良好。
天胡开局了属于是。
唯一的问题是别人都对我视而不见。
想要获取存在感，就要参与进一些有奇怪设定的故事线，改写少女们的人生。
……
试图成为祥子的白月光：
那我问你，白祥是无敌的吗？
试图成为立希的好朋友。
别老是板着脸，夜色里所有的目光都闭上了。
……
方芷：“负责，负什么责？那不是另一个故事的事吗？你们怎么都围上来了。求安慰和贴贴的话免费……”
祥子：“我不会让你再次消失了，所以请好好的看着我。”
立希：“我不会停在此刻，但我觉得还是顺手把你捆上比较好。”
方芷：“呱，救我啊！”
『⌓‿⌓』

d_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11177,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":2357},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1768831219,"author_reply_time":1768878474,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597890509599834905","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在我读过的少女乐队同人里，这本绝对算得上精品。因篇幅不长，文中的剧情脉络暂不发表意见，但单论笔风，作者的文笔却完全看不出属于新人的生涩。主要用琐碎的日常，略多的神态和动作描写，优雅生动的将几位少女的情绪温吞地铺展、传递给读者。文风是比较文艺细腻的，结合前面的描写方式，可以明显的感觉到文中情感传递更有层次，把几位少女之间的情感刻画得极致美好，仿佛将原作中未多提及的ccc时期，五人所亲历的那些温柔与珍贵，尽数描摹了出来，这就是精雕细琢啊[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769025990,"group_id":"7561077268945062937","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1m54/kgVQ6t8QmF3ScdsZseG9USs6XLGq6uvlStaLNx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e3ea9d82073949d28ff6225bdbe2df07~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528166&x-signature=5NgSnitbLUcuPKG4SEXUFh%2FNR%2B8%3D","user_id":"1302259608070365","user_name":"夏弥与遥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1302259608070365","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7561077268945062937","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，比较低）
